name: Raspberry Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, margarine or butter, and sour cream in a large mixing bowl until thoroughly combined.
2. Divide dough into two halves. Cover; chill for 3 hours.
3. Roll each half of dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thickness.
4. Using a 1-3/4 to 2-inch round cookie cutter, cut the dough.
5. Spread about 1/4 tsp raspberry fruit on top of half of the cookies. Top with remaining cookies.
6. Stir together sugar and 1 tbsp water in a small bowl.
7. Brush the mixture over the cookies. Place them on a lightly greased baking sheet.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes or until done. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
9. Meanwhile, melt chocolate pieces and shortening in a small heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
10. Dip one side of each cookie into the melted chocolate. Place on waxed paper; sprinkle with almonds.
11. Allow to set before serving. Makes about 72 cookies.
